purpose: Diverse public PDFs to stress-test the library extraction pipeline. Categories help interpret QC scores: broker-style combined statements are the primary product target; other types surface edge cases for future heuristics or VL.

items.note: Created by scripts/make_sample_pdf.py. Expect high QC — sanity check for the evaluator.
US tax form: boxes and lines, not broker tables. Useful to see how much structure we infer.
PLDI-style paper: two-column layout, figures. Expect validation noise — different goal than statements.
arXiv article (single column typical). Long-form text + occasional tables.
SEC blank 10-K template. Some networks block curl — download in a browser if needed.
